mapper.select: SELECT * FROM app_user WHERE username = #{username} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM app_user WHERE user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1

SELECT * FROM app_user
username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR roles_json LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO app_user (user_id, username, password_hash, real_name, roles_json, status, created_at, updated_at, last_login_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{realName}, #{rolesJson}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{lastLoginAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE app_user SET username = #{username}, real_name = #{realName}, roles_json = #{rolesJson}, status = #{status}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
